steps.title: Find the sentence's main verb
steps.content: After the introductory phrase, the subject is embryos inside African turquoise killifish eggs. The blank must supply the main finite verb for what those embryos do when water is scarce.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite verb forms
steps.content: Choice B is an infinitive. Choice C is a participial phrase. Choice D is also a participle. None of those forms can serve as the main verb of the independent clause. The answer is A.
